$metadata.description: PM Dashboard — daily home base for tracking features, launches, user analytics, and OKRs

alertBanner.empty: Not rendered. Absence of the alert IS the positive signal.
alertBanner.active: Warning variant shown with specific issue text and dismiss action

statCards.empty: Show '—' as value with 'No data yet' as trend text
statCards.loading: Skeleton pulse on value and trend

roadmap.empty: Illustration + 'No features yet' + primary button 'Create your first feature'
roadmap.error: 'Unable to load roadmap' with retry link

launches.empty: 'No active launches' + 'Start a rollout' button. This is normal between launch cycles.
launches.error: 'Unable to load launches' with retry link

goals.empty: 'No OKRs set for this quarter' + 'Set your goals' button. Common at quarter start.
goals.error: 'Unable to load goals' with retry link

activityFeed.empty: 'Nothing happened yet. Activity will appear here as your team ships.' No action needed — this resolves itself.
activityFeed.error: 'Unable to load activity' with retry link

textContent.value: 2 OKRs are off-track. Checkout redesign launch has elevated error rate (2.3%).

children.name: Nav: Overview
children.$note: Active state — wrap in frame with bg-active fill at build time

children.name: Sidebar Spacer
children.$note: Pushes user profile to bottom of sidebar

children.name: Alert Banner
children.variant: default — extract warning variant at build time

overrides.title: Attention needed
overrides.supportingText: 2 OKRs are off-track. Checkout redesign launch has elevated error rate (2.3%).

children.$note: Only rendered when issues exist. Use warning color variant. Extract full alert.json on-demand to find Size=full-width, Color=warning variant key.

children.name: Gauge
children.variant: default — extract compact/small variant at build time
children.$note: Extract full activity-gauge.json to find a compact variant without legend

children.name: Gauge
children.variant: default — extract compact/small variant at build time

children.name: Progress Bar
children.$note: Token-built progress bar. Inner fill frame at 67% width with bg-success-primary fill.

children.name: Activity Feed
children.$note: Extract full activity-feed.json at build time to select notification variant with 5+ items
